data.body: MERGED + CLOSED. All 6 Gerrit changes merged (900-905 epic stack + 911 flaky fix). Worktree ff'd to origin/main. CLOSED bottom-up: S1(ef33), S2(ce4d), S3(94f9), S4(6673), S5(dfb9), bug 5e94(--class flaky). S2/S3 completion-verifier initially false-negatived on per-story scope ACs (verifier sees cumulative main + can't run git); resolved via evidence comments (per-commit git diff + CI Verified+1 attestation). S4 closed clean (narrowed [SPLIT->4af8] ACs accepted). EPIC bbf1 CANNOT close: open-children invariant blocks it while 4af8 (deferred differ-DI routing follow-up, a child) is open. BUG 80af reframed per user: completion-verify target IS configurable (verify-completion --ref / REBAR_GATE_REF / [snapshot].ref; close verifies ref=HEAD so checkout target commit) — real defect is DOCS/DISCOVERABILITY (not surfaced on transition-close path). Pending user decision: leave epic in_progress pending 4af8, or detach 4af8 to close epic now.
